name: Franck MBE
title: Data Analyst · Data Engineer
profile: Passionate Data Analyst with expertise in Big Data, BI and Data Engineering. Specialized in data-driven solutions, Azure cloud and visualization. Currently interning at ENI France, seeking a permanent role from September 2026.

cardInfo.text: MBA Big Data & AI — MBA ESG (2027)

paragraphs: With an MBA in Big Data & AI from MBA ESG and hands-on experience as an intern at ENI France, I combine analytical rigor with business acumen to deliver actionable insights.
My career spans the entire data value chain: from collection and transformation (ETL pipelines, Azure Data Lake) to visualization and business presentation (Power BI, Tableau, Streamlit).
Bilingual French / English B1-B2, I'm comfortable both in technical environments and presenting insights to non-technical stakeholders.
about.highlight: 🎯 My goal: join a Data team on a permanent contract in Paris (or full-remote) from September 2026 to contribute to impactful data projects with strong business value.

cdi.title: Seeking Permanent Role — September 2026
cdi.subtitle: Profile available at end of internship
items: Sector: All sectors (Energy, Finance, Tech, E-commerce…)
